issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.M` is always true here (`SDK_INT` ≥ 24 and < 30)
The resource `R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.app_description` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="app_description">See exactly what\'s eating your storage.</string>

issue.message: Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/ic_launcher_foreground_image.png` in densityless folder
